sentences.translation: Mejsa je otkrila da joj se torba istrošila.
sentences.translationEn: Maysa found that her bag had worn out.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَدَّخِرَ لِشِرَاءِ حَقِيبَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da uštedi za kupovinu nove torbe.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to save up to buy a new bag.

sentences.arabic: كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ وَضَعَتْ بَعْضَ نُقُودِهَا جَانِبًا.
sentences.translation: Svake sedmice je stavljala nešto novca sa strane.
sentences.translationEn: Every week she set aside some of her money.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ شَهْرٍ جَمَعَتِ المَبْلَغَ وَاشْتَرَتِ الحَقِيبَةَ.
sentences.translation: Nakon mjeseca dana sakupila je iznos i kupila torbu.
sentences.translationEn: After a month she had saved the amount and bought the bag.

sentences.translation: Bila je jako sretna sa svojom novom torbom.
sentences.translationEn: She was very happy with her new bag.
